response:
SECTION 1  
"What would an innocent person say after he falsely received a verdict from the court?"  

SECTION 2  
"An innocent person, caught in a web of deception, would likely express his confusion and injustice. He might lead a plea for fairness, using a silver tongue to convince others of his plight. A sir, in this moment, would offer support, though his words might be wrapped in uncertainty. The stranger, who had once been a friend, now stood as a symbol of the system's betrayal."
